series_metadata.series_description: Files of grants applied for, but ultimately no grant funding was received. Files may include, but are not limited to, the grant application submitted, supporting documentation, record explaining rejection, and miscellaneous correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 2 years from beginning of internal grant preparations. ; Paper: Retain 2 years from beginning of internal grant preparations or until converted to electronic format., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
